message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant arm_io_storage as "arm_io_storage"
participant io_storage as "io_storage"
participant io_fip as "io_fip"
participant io_memmap as "io_memmap"

actor arm_io_storage

note right of arm_io_storage
  arm_io_setup()
end note

rect io dev registration
  register_io_dev_fip(&fip_dev_con)
  io_register_device(&dev_info_pool[])
  devices[dev_count] = (fip_)dev_info_pool
  dev_count++
  register_io_dev_memmap(&memmap_dev_con)
  io_register_device(&memmap_dev_info)
  devices[dev_count] = memmap_dev_info
  dev_count++
end rect

  io_dev_open(fip_dev_con, NULL, fip_dev_handle)
  dev_open(dev_con, dev_spec, handle)
  opt [dev_open() on fip device]
    flip_dev_open(dev_spec, dev_info)
    dev_info = one of the "fip_dev_info" from dev_info_pool[]
  end opt

  io_dev_open(memmap_dev_con, NULL, memmap_dev_handle)
  dev_open(dev_con, dev_spec, handle)
  opt [dev_open() on memmap device]
    memmap_dev_open(dev_spec, dev_info)
    dev_info = memmap_dev_info
  end opt

@enduml
